summary: After breaking out of a week-long range, the trader is holding a runner long and expects a possible backtest of the former resistance zone (7458-7465) before prices push higher toward 7515, 7530, and 7555. Line in the sand: 7458. Above it, bulls are in control and the breakout is intact; below it, the market likely falls back into the old range and the bullish case weakens.
